seasonContext: We are currently in week 10 of the SS26 season, with approximately 3.6 months left to sell. Sales typically ramp up from March to June, so early-season performance is crucial for setting the stage.

briefing.morningGreeting: Sales are steady, with a total revenue of $212,964 and a gross margin of 46%. We need to focus on optimizing our inventory and reorders to maintain momentum.
briefing.healthContext: The health metrics reflect a blended sell-through rate of 25%, which is moderate but indicates room for improvement as we approach the peak selling months.

salesAnalytics.revenueInsight: Revenue is up compared to last spring, but we need to push for higher sell-through rates as we move deeper into the season.
salesAnalytics.brandInsight: Top performers include DAZE and Z SUPPLY with sell-through rates of 31% and 34%, respectively. Focus on these brands for reorders.
salesAnalytics.channelInsight: POS sales are significantly outperforming online sales, with $25,576 from POS compared to $6,856 online. Enhance in-store promotions to capitalize on this trend.

sellThrough.overallInsight: The overall blended sell-through rate is 25%, which is acceptable but should be improved as we approach peak season.
sellThrough.topPerformers: DAZE's Pleaser High Rise Ankle Jean and Z SUPPLY's styles are performing well; prioritize reordering these items.
sellThrough.slowMovers: Slow movers include ICHI's Dahlia Skinny Brown Belt and Z SUPPLY's Scout Cotton Jersey Pant. Consider markdowns or promotions to clear these items.
sellThrough.brandRecommendations: Increase orders for DAZE and Z SUPPLY due to their strong performance. Maintain stock levels for ICHI and SADIE AND SAGE, but reduce orders for underperforming brands like GLAMOROUS.

inventoryHealth.agingInsight: Inventory at cost is $342,406, indicating potential dead stock issues. Focus on moving slow sellers to improve cash flow.
inventoryHealth.categoryWOS: The TOP category has a WOS of 39.0, suggesting we need to reduce stock or increase promotions to improve sell-through.
inventoryHealth.sizeGaps: There is an under-buy in size M (demand 25%, buy 21%). Increase orders for this size to meet demand.

buyPlanning.otbContext: We are properly stocked overall, but specific categories and sizes need attention to optimize sales.
buyPlanning.seasonalComparison: SS26 is showing improved revenue compared to SS25, but we must keep pushing for higher sell-through rates.
buyPlanning.actionItems: 1. Reorder top-performing styles from DAZE and Z SUPPLY. 2. Implement promotions for slow-moving items. 3. Adjust size orders to address gaps in M size.

customers.vipInsight: Our top customers are showing strong engagement, with several having multiple orders. Focus on retaining these customers through targeted promotions.
customers.segmentInsight: Customer mix remains diverse, but we need to analyze purchasing patterns to tailor our offerings better.

metricsSummary: Season context: SS26 week 10 of 26. Roughly 3.6 months remain in the selling season. Overall: revenue $212,964, gross margin 46%, blended sell-through 25%, inventory at cost $342,406, inventory at retail $862,975, annualized turns 1.8x. Top 10 brands by revenue: ICHI ($56,838, ST 24%, GM 63%, sold 1,023, stock 3,159); DAZE ($29,333, ST 31%, GM 56%, sold 204, stock 464); Z SUPPLY ($26,480, ST 34%, GM 56%, sold 273, stock 525); B YOUNG ($22,082, ST 21%, GM 63%, sold 481, stock 1,853); RD STYLE ($22,005, ST 26%, GM 62%, sold 348, stock 987); PILGRIM ($15,391, ST 24%, GM 59%, sold 335, stock 1,051); SAINT TROPEZ ($10,829, ST 18%, GM 60%, sold 156, stock 695); DEX ($7,590, ST 27%, GM 61%, sold 113, stock 303); DELUC ($6,634, ST 25%, GM 58%, sold 95, stock 279); SADIE AND SAGE ($3,931, ST 20%, GM 57%, sold 67, stock 273). Bottom 5 brands by sell-through: GLAMOROUS (9%, $80, stock 43); GENTLE FAWN (10%, $20, stock 9); CAMILLE (11%, $33, stock 8); SECOND SKIN (15%, $2,277, stock 370); BRUNETTE (15%, $631, stock 33). Categories: TOP (ST 21%, WOS 39.0, stock 3,798, revenue $46,737); DENIM (ST 28%, WOS 26.0, stock 731, revenue $34,210); SWEATER (ST 37%, WOS 17.0, stock 875, revenue $30,708); PANT (ST 23%, WOS 33.0, stock 1,007, revenue $22,162); JACKET (ST 39%, WOS 15.0, stock 270, revenue $20,420); JEWELRY (ST 23%, WOS 33.0, stock 949, revenue $13,766); CARDIGAN (ST 28%, WOS 25.0, stock 440, revenue $11,672); BLAZER (ST 19%, WOS 44.0, stock 258, revenue $5,711); DRESS (ST 14%, WOS 62.0, stock 579, revenue $5,571); ACCESSORIES (ST 18%, WOS 46.0, stock 640, revenue $4,599); VEST (ST 47%, WOS 11.0, stock 72, revenue $2,776); SKIRT (ST 23%, WOS 33.0, stock 177, revenue $2,383). Reorder alerts count: 7. Reorder-now styles: ICHI — CORNSTALK JACKET (0.2/wk, 100%); ICHI — BLACK MESH BALLET FLAT (0.1/wk, 100%); B YOUNG — CHERRY OVERSIZED CREWNECK SWEATER (0.0/wk, 100%); RD STYLE — SAYLOR BLOUSE (CREAM) (0.1/wk, 100%); DAZE — PLEASER HIGH RISE ANKLE JEAN (BLACK) (0.4/wk, 83%); SADIE AND SAGE — CREAM WIDE LEG DENIM (0.0/wk, 100%); SAGE THE LABEL — NAVY STRETCH TOP (0.0/wk, 100%). Top sold-out styles by velocity: ICHI CORNSTALK JACKET (0.2/wk, 100%, 6.8 weeks); RD STYLE SAYLOR BLOUSE (CREAM) (0.1/wk, 100%, 29.4 weeks); ICHI BLACK MESH BALLET FLAT (0.1/wk, 100%, 47.6 weeks); SADIE AND SAGE CREAM WIDE LEG DENIM (0.0/wk, 100%, 51.9 weeks); SAGE THE LABEL NAVY STRETCH TOP (0.0/wk, 100%, 47.6 weeks). Size gaps under-bought: M (+4 pts; demand 25%, buy 21%). Size gaps over-bought: XXL (-4 pts; demand 1%, buy 5%); XL (-3 pts; demand 7%, buy 10%); XS (-2 pts; demand 15%, buy 17%). Store breakdown: Saint John: $95,838 revenue, 41%, 1,646 units, AOV $133; Moncton: $67,883 revenue, 50%, 992 units, AOV $160; Halifax: $49,243 revenue, 47%, 748 units, AOV $122. Best performers: RD STYLE — SOFT KNIT BROWN HALF ZIP (9 units, $711); PILGRIM — GIFT WITH PURCHASE (RED HEART - GOLD) (9 units, $0); RD STYLE — DARK GREY CREW NECK PULLOVER (8 units, $316); RD STYLE — VICTORIA BLACK PULL ON SWEATS (6 units, $474); ICHI — IVO GREY BEANIE (6 units, $117); ICHI — REFINED SQUARE NECK TOP (BLACK) (6 units, $147); ICHI — REFINED SQUARE NECK TOP (CHOCOLATE) (6 units, $157); ICHI — KATE OFFICE WIDE LEG TROUSER (BLK) (6 units, $579). Slow movers: ICHI — DAHLIA SKINNY BROWN BELT (1 units, $23, 0.1/wk); PILGRIM — JAMESON SILVER RING (1 units, $59, 0.1/wk); PILGRIM — SPARKLE GOLD NECKLACE SET (1 units, $69, 0.1/wk); ICHI — DASILA CARDIGAN (BLUE) (1 units, $69, 0.1/wk); B YOUNG — FUZZY CONTRAST SWEATER (1 units, $55, 0.1/wk); Z SUPPLY — SCOUT COTTON JERSEY PANT (GREEN) (1 units, $53, 0.1/wk); Z SUPPLY — ALL DAY KNIT JACKET (CHOCOLATE) (1 units, $101, 0.1/wk); LA — TIE FRONT KNIT CARDI (CREAM) (1 units, $48, 0.1/wk). Customers: total 6,904, with orders 2,024, total spent $606,987. Top customers: Alissa DeWare ($0, 32 orders); Alison Bulmer ($0, 16 orders); Alexandra Woodworth ($0, 47 orders); Linda Boudreau ($0, 29 orders); Karen Thomas ($0, 30 orders).
